low.prompt_suffix: Keep the original composition, subject placement, and core visual content unchanged. Improve texture clarity, edge quality, and overall polish only.

mid.prompt_suffix: Preserve the original composition and subject identity. Improve texture, detail, lighting polish, and material richness without changing the main scene layout.

high.prompt_suffix: Strongly preserve the original composition, subject identity, and scene structure. Upgrade detail fidelity and finish quality toward a polished 4K result without changing what is in the image.
